functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Heartwood Notes
pages:
Heartwood Notes

A Choascraft guide for heartwood lore, redwood drops, and the living forest creatures of the redwood biome.

Lore

Heartwood is the stubborn memory of a redwood given motion. It is not quite tree, not quite animal, and not fond of axes.

Fact 1

Real redwoods can live for a very long time and grow to enormous size when conditions are right.

Fact 2

Tree heartwood is older, inner wood. It gives strength and stores the history of growth rings.

Choascraft Heartwood

Heartwood belongs to the redwood creature family and drops redwood materials.

Drops

Heartwood can drop Redwood Logs and sometimes a Redwood Sapling.

Crafting Uses

Redwood Logs become redwood planks, doors, trapdoors, slabs, stairs, fences, fence gates, buttons, sticks, and pressure plates.

Saplings

Redwood Saplings let you bring the redwood biome home, or repair what the forest lost.

Field Note

If a tree watches you back, lower the axe and listen first.
